messages.content: You're talking to a user who has concerns about skincare.
I've heard about the harmful effects of sunlight on the skin. Should I wear sunscreen even on cloudy days?

Yes, you should apply sunscreen on cloudy days as well. UVA rays, which cause skin aging and can lead to cancer, can penetrate through clouds. So, while it might not feel hot, your skin is still exposed to harmful rays.
I guess I should be more conscious about applying sunscreen daily. Although it might not be sunny out, harmful rays could
